debug_info.goal:
⊢ PEqualsNP →
    ∀ (k : ℕ) (α : Type) [inst : Primcodable α] (ea : FinEncoding α) (L : Language α), SigmakP k ea L ↔ InP ea L

failed_attempts:
by
  intro h k
  induction' k using Nat.strong_induction_on with k ih generalizing h
  rcases k with (_ | _ | k) <;> simp_all +decide
  · exact fun α [Primcodable α] ea L ↦ Eq.to_iff rfl
  · intro α _ ea L
    refine' ⟨fun h' => _, fun h' => _⟩
    · exact h α ea L |>.2 (SigmakP_one_imp_InNP ea L h')
    · exact InNP_imp_SigmakP_one ea L (h α ea L |>.1 h')
  · intro α _ ea L; constructor
    · intro hL
      obtain ⟨β, instβ, eb, L', h_inner, p, cert⟩ := hL
      have h_ind : InP (pairEncoding ea eb) (Complement L') :=
        ih _ le_rfl _ _ _ |>.1 h_inner
      have h_ind' : InP (pairEncoding ea eb) L' := by
        convert InP_complement _ _ h_ind using 1
        exact funext fun x => by simp +decide [Complement]
      convert h α ea L |>.2 _ using 1
      obtain ⟨f', hf', hf''⟩ := h_ind'
      use β, instβ, eb, fun a b => f' (a, b) = true, p, ⟨f', hf', by aesop⟩, by aesop
    · intro hL
      obtain ⟨β, instβ, eb, L', f, hf₁, hf₂⟩ := h α ea L |>.1 hL
      obtain ⟨verifier, comp, hverifier⟩ := hf₁
      refine' ⟨β, instβ, eb, fun p => verifier p, _, _⟩ <;> simp_all +decide [SigmakP]
      · exact InP_complement _ _ ⟨verifier, comp, by aesop⟩
      · exact ⟨f, fun a =>
          ⟨fun ⟨b, hb₁, hb₂⟩ => ⟨b, hb₂, hb₁⟩, fun ⟨b, hb₂, hb₁⟩ => ⟨b, hb₁, hb₂⟩⟩⟩
